title: achillea oxyloba subsp. schurii
intro: Achillea oxyloba subsp. schurii, also known as the Hungarian yarrow or Schur's yarrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial in reducing pain, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues. Achillea oxyloba subsp. schurii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
